Years of Culinary Excellence
Serving authentic Kerala, Indian, and Continental delicacies.
OUR STORY

About Our Restaurant

Kanary Restaurant has been Thrissur's premier multi-cuisine dining destination since 2018. Known for our rich flavors and uncompromising quality, we take pride in using premium, wholesome ingredients like pure A2 milk and A2 ghee to elevate our traditional recipes.

Nestled in the cultural capital of Kerala, Thrissur (with branches at MG Road, Koorkenchery, and Ayyanthole), we offer an immersive culinary journey. From traditional Malabar spices to global Continental plates, our chefs prepare every meal with pure dedication.

A2 Milk & Ghee

Exclusively premium A2 dairy products.

Authentic Taste

Original traditional Keralite flavors.

Premium Quality

Carefully sourced fresh ingredients.

OUR SPECIALTIES

Discover Our Menu

Savor our premier multi-cuisine offerings, crafted to perfection with traditional spices, pure A2 ghee, and fresh ingredients.

Sizzling Garlic Butter Prawns

Chef's Special Spicy

Royal Kerala Fish Curry

Chef's Special

Grand Mughal Butter Chicken

LOOK MENU
VISUAL JOURNEY

Kanary Restaurant Gallery

Take a visual tour of our culinary creations, elegant interiors, and the warm, inviting atmosphere that awaits you.

Signature Main Course

Kerala Fish Curry

Cooked slowly in traditional clay pots with kudampuli and fresh coconut.

Fine Dining Room

Warm Ambience

Elegant forest green decor, custom gold fixtures, and cozy booth seating.

Tandoori Special

Butter Chicken

Creamy tomato-butter gravy with marinated roasted chicken chunks.

Gourmet Starter

Garlic Prawns

Sizzling prawns cooked in white butter, herbs, and caramelized garlic.

Family & Friends

Dining Experience

Sharing smiles and authentic food in a welcoming, luxurious environment.

Decadent Dessert

Chocolate Brownie

Warm fudge brownie topped with rich chocolate sauce and vanilla ice cream.

WHY CHOOSE US

Our Commitment to Quality

For years, we have set the benchmark for authentic multi-cuisine dining in Thrissur. Here is why our customers keep coming back.

Fresh Ingredients

We source fresh local produce daily and grind our signature Kerala spice blends in-house to preserve essential oils and natural flavors.

Experienced Chefs

Our kitchen is helmed by culinary maestros with decades of experience preparing traditional Kerala stews, curries, and regional specialties.

Family Friendly

A warm, spacious, and inviting dining room designed to accommodate families and large groups comfortably with dedicated hospitality.

Fast Service

We respect your time. Our kitchen operations are optimized to ensure your meals are cooked fresh and served hot without unnecessary delays.

Hygienic Kitchen

We enforce strict 5-star safety protocols, utilizing state-of-the-art sanitization, pure filtered water, and spotless preparation surfaces.

Experience It Yourself

Join us for lunch or dinner to taste the true legacy of premium multi-cuisine cooking. Reserve your table in seconds.

EXPERIENCE KANARY

A Culinary Journey of Pure Senses

Take a virtual tour of our kitchen and dining hall. Watch our master chefs craft traditional Kerala delicacies and international masterpieces.

TESTIMONIALS

What Our Guests Say

“Amazing food and excellent ambience. The Kerala Fish Curry had the perfect balance of spices, and the service was exceptionally warm.”

BOOKINGS

Reserve A Table

Secure your table for lunch or dinner. Fill out the form, and send it directly via WhatsApp or Email for instant verification.

Reservation Guidelines

For online booking requests, please submit the form at least 2 hours prior to your desired dining time.

Instant WhatsApp Submission

Direct chat confirmation with our manager.

Seating Preferences

Choose from Standard Dining, Family Section, or romantic Candlelight settings.

Need Help? Call Us

Call +91 98765 43210 for immediate group bookings or event inquiries.

Note: Table bookings are held for a maximum of 15 minutes past the reserved slot. Dress code: Smart Casual.

FIND US

Contact Us

We are located in the heart of Thrissur. Visit us at any of our branches or reach out for catering inquiries and reservations.
